description: Extract the 'allowVirtualMachine' and 'allowScreenSharing' boolean settings for all 'EXAM_CONFIG' entries in the SEB Server MariaDB database (container: 'seb-server-mariadb', user: 'root', password: 'sebserver123', database: 'SEBServer'). The database uses an Entity-Attribute-Value (EAV) schema involving tables 'configuration_node', 'configuration_attribute', and 'configuration_value'. Save the results to '~/Documents/compliance_report.csv' with three columns: 'Configuration Name', 'Allow Virtual Machine', and 'Allow Screen Sharing'. Each row must contain the configuration name and its corresponding boolean values.
